page.title: Identity Verification
page.subtitle: Complete verification to unlock higher limits and full platform access

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.description: Enter your personal details as they appear on your government-issued ID

documentUpload.title: ID Document Upload
documentUpload.description: Upload a clear photo of your government-issued ID

front.label: Front Side
front.dropText: Drop front image here or click to browse

back.label: Back Side (optional)
back.dropText: Drop back image here or click to browse

documentUpload.requirements: Document must be clearly visible, not expired, and all details must match the information provided above.

selfie.title: Selfie Verification
selfie.description: Take a selfie holding your ID next to your face
selfie.dropText: Drop your selfie here or click to take a photo
selfie.requirements: Make sure your face and ID are clearly visible in good lighting

review.title: Review Your Information
review.description: Please verify all information before submitting

submitted.title: Verification Submitted
submitted.description: Your verification documents have been submitted successfully.
submitted.note: You will receive a notification once your verification is complete.

verified.title: Verification Approved!
verified.description: Your identity has been verified successfully.

rejected.title: Verification Not Approved
rejected.description: We were unable to verify your identity with the information provided.

commonReasons.blurryImage: Uploaded images are not clear enough
commonReasons.mismatchedInfo: Information does not match the document

rejected.contactSupport: If you believe this is an error, please contact support.

errors.invalidFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload JPG, PNG, or PDF
errors.uploadFailed: File upload failed. Please try again.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit verification. Please try again.
